entities.name: BRASSICA NAPUS
entities.description: The target plant species for transformation

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM
entities.description: The bacterium used for transferring DNA into the plant

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM BINARY VECTORS
entities.description: The tool used for the transformation of B. napus

entities.name: COTYLEDONARY PETIOLES
entities.description: The target tissue used for transformation

entities.name: REGENERATION FREQUENCY
entities.description: The rate at which plants regenerate from the target tissue

entities.name: ORGANOGENESIS
entities.description: The process of organ formation from the cut surface of the tissue

entities.name: TOPICAL INFECTION
entities.description: The method of applying Agrobacterium to the target tissue

entities.name: BINARY PLASMID
entities.description: The plasmid used to carry the NPT II gene

entities.name: NPT II
entities.description: Neomycin phosphotransferase, used as a selectable marker

entities.name: SELECTIVE REGENERATION MEDIUM
entities.description: Medium used to select for transgenic plantlets

entities.name: KANAMYCIN
entities.description: The antibiotic used for selection in the regeneration medium

entities.name: DOT BLOTS
entities.description: Assay used to detect NPT II activity in leaves

entities.name: SOUTHERN BLOTTING
entities.description: Method used to analyze the integration of T-DNA

entities.name: T-DNA
entities.description: The DNA segment transferred into the plant genome

entities.name: GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material of B. napus

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of transgenic plants to develop fertile flowers

entities.name: SINGLE EMBRYO NPT II ASSAY
entities.description: Assay performed on developing seeds to study progeny

entities.name: LEAF BLEACHING ASSAY
entities.description: Assay performed on germinating seedlings to study progeny
